chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit -1056 of 2024 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature of the Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of CMA No.11707/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.11588/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.10430/2024 4. For orders on office objection at flag “A” 19.09.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the plaintiff Mr. Muhammad Vawda, advocate for defendants 6,7 & 9 Mirza Sarfraz Ahmed, advocate for defendants No.8 Mr. K.A. Vaswani, AAG Learned counsel for the plaintiff states that the plaint may be returned for presentation before the competent authority. Order accordingly. Plaint is returned. Judge Amjad
